pdf_options.headerTemplate: SSTCP工程维保管理系统操作手册
pdf_options.footerTemplate: 第 页 / 共 页

css: body { font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'SimSun', sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; } h1 { color: #001f3f; border-bottom: 2px solid #001f3f; padding-bottom: 10px; } h2 { color: #001f3f; border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc; padding-bottom: 8px; margin-top: 30px; } h3 { color: #333; margin-top: 20px; } table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; margin: 15px 0; } th, td { border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 10px; text-align: left; } th { background-color: #001f3f; color: white; } tr:nth-child(even) { background-color: #f9f9f9; } blockquote { border-left: 4px solid #001f3f; padding-left: 15px; color: #666; margin: 15px 0; } code { background-color: #f5f5f5; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 3px; } pre { background-color: #f5f5f5; padding: 15px; border-radius: 5px; overflow-x: auto; }
